title: RelBench rel-avito Dataset Preparation for JRN Experiments
summary: Demo notebook exploring the RelBench rel-avito relational database transformed for Join Reproduction Number (JRN) experiments. Loads a curated mini dataset (mini_demo_data.json) containing 4 item types: dataset metadata, table data (AdsInfo, SearchInfo, Category with sample rows and column statistics), FK join metadata (fanout distributions and coverage for 3 joins), and 4 prediction task splits (regression, binary classification, link prediction). Includes visualizations of table sizes, FK fanout distributions, column dtype composition, task sample sizes, and class balance.
